Request a demo

Built for your kind of facility.

SYAG is not a generic security platform. It's designed around the specific operational realities of the facilities it serves. Find your facility type below.

Residential Communities

Guard management, visitor passes, camera events, and IoT sensors — unified for the facility manager who runs a community, not a corporation.

Learn more →

Gated Communities

HOA-style management with resident-facing visitor pre-registration, gate access logging, and community-wide incident awareness.

Learn more →

Mixed-Use Developments

Office towers, retail floors, and residential units in the same perimeter. SYAG handles multi-zone operations with role-based access per tenant.

Learn more →

Industrial Facilities

High asset density, shift-heavy workforces, IoT-intensive environments. SYAG's asset management and IoT modules were built for this.

Learn more →

Healthcare Campuses

Patient safety, staff protection, contractor management, and 24/7 incident responsiveness. SYAG covers the operational security layer.

Learn more →

Educational Campuses

Student safety, scheduled access for authorised visitors, patrol routes across large campuses, and emergency protocol automation.

Learn more →

Not sure which solution fits your facility?

Request a demo and we'll walk you through the right configuration for your specific setup.

Request a demo →
